description: Composition Purple shirt with black pinstripes and light purple polka dots, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves, butttoned cuffs, full front button placket, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hem Fit RegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry on normal or line dryWarm iron Formal clothes don't have to be boring! Make your weekdays fun by wearing this formal striped shirt from genesis. This shirt looks fresh and crisp, and the fabric will keep you fresh all day long, while the long sleeves are sure to keep the a/c chill at bay. Pair it with well-fitting formal trousers and a pair of leather shoes to take the office by storm! Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
